title: EPITAPHS
author: Countee Cullen
content:

FOR A SINGER                              48

FOR A MAGICIAN                            55
FOR A PESSIMIST                           56

FOR LOVE’S SAKE

OH, FOR A LITTLE WHILE BE KIND            77

CAPRICE                                   81
